old_value: {"id":"smallhold-92vp","title":"Unbounded response body reads before size check","description":"In federation.rs, fetch_actor() (line ~196) and resolve_webfinger() (line ~235) call resp.bytes().await to read the entire response body into memory, then check if body_bytes.len() \u003e 1_048_576. A malicious server can force OOM by sending a multi-GB response. Fix: use reqwest's body streaming with a size-limited reader, or set Content-Length limits on the reqwest client, or read in chunks and abort once the limit is exceeded.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-18T18:23:42.342796685Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T18:23:42.342796685Z","labels":["codereview"]}
